title: gh#63: R2.3 — Add planTransitionToPublishing + TransitionDecision
reasoning:
Imported from https://github.com/joshgk00/social-media-scheduler/issues/63.
Backlog section: Candidate 2 — Post Lifecycle aggregate.

## Context

Third PR in Candidate 2. The first worker-driven aggregate operation. Concentrates the inside-FOR-UPDATE decision logic of `publishPost` into a pure function. The worker's transaction shape, lock-release-before-network discipline, and budget-check callback wiring all stay where they are per ADR-0004 (5A).

## Scope

- Add to `packages/shared/src/post/aggregate.ts`:
  ```ts
  planTransitionToPublishing(
    currentRow: PostState,
    profile: { platform: Platform; ... },  // narrowed projection — not the full row
    preflight: PreflightState,
  ): TransitionDecision
  ```
  where:
  ```ts
  type TransitionDecision =
    | { kind: 'proceed'; patch: PostPatch }
    | { kind: 'recover'; recoveryPlatformPostId: string };
  ```
- Decision logic moves from `worker/post-lifecycle.service.ts` (the inside-tx block):
  - If `status === 'publishing'` AND `platformPostId` is set → return `{ kind: 'recover', recoveryPlatformPostId }` (issue #17 recovery path)
  - If `platformPostId` is already set (any other status path that allows it) → throw `PostInvariantError({ kind: 'already_published' })`
  - If `status !== 'scheduled'` → throw `PostInvariantError({ kind: 'not_scheduled' })`
  - If `isThread` AND platform Twitter (Phase 4 scope) → throw `PostInvariantError({ kind: 'thread_unsupported' })`
  - If `!preflight.mediaReady` → throw `PostInvariantError({ kind: 'media_pending' })`
  - If `!preflight.tokenHealthy` → throw `PostInvariantError({ kind: 'token_unhealthy' })`
  - If `preflight.budgetExhausted` → throw `PostInvariantError({ kind: 'budget_exhausted' })`
  - If `preflight.rateLimitExhausted` → throw `PostInvariantError({ kind: 'rate_limit_exhausted' })`
  - Otherwise return `{ kind: 'proceed', patch: { status: 'publishing', bumpVersion: true } }`
- Update `packages/worker/src/post-lifecycle.service.ts`:
  - Map `LockedPostRow` (snake_case raw SQL projection) to `PostState` at the boundary
  - Map `socialProfiles.$inferSelect` to the narrow profile projection
  - Compute `PreflightState` from existing `checkBudget` / `checkTokenHealth` / media query callbacks
  - Call `planTransitionToPublishing(...)`, switch on the discriminant, write the patch in the transaction
  - Translate `PostInvariantError` to `PostLifecycleAbort` for the worker's existing graceful-abort handling (subset only: `already_published`, `not_scheduled`, `thread_unsupported`, `media_pending`, `token_unhealthy`, `budget_exhausted`, `rate_limit_exhausted`)
- Unit tests for `planTransitionToPublishing`: every decision branch + every error `kind`

## Out of scope

- `planRecordSuccess` / `planRecordFailure` (R2.4)
- Narrowing `PostLifecycleAbort` shape (R2.5 sweep)

## Acceptance

- `pnpm --filter @sms/shared build` and test pass
- `pnpm --filter @sms/worker build` and test pass
- Existing `post-lifecycle.test.ts` cases pass without behavior change
- The 4 core invariants documented at the top of `post-lifecycle.service.ts` (idempotency, optimistic lock, runtime budget re-check, lock-release-before-network) are still enforced — verify each has a test

## References

- ADRs: [0003](../blob/main/docs/adr/0003-post-lifecycle-is-pure-functions-not-shared-repository.md), [0004](../blob/main/docs/adr/0004-publish-cycle-orchestration-stays-in-the-worker.md)
- Depends on: #61
